title: Soil Organic Carbon (SOC) prediction API
desc: An API for predicting soil organic carbon (SOC) content using machine learning models trained on soil data. The API allows users to input soil parameters and receive SOC predictions. This is a valuable tool for soil health assessment and management.

title: Uncovering the Patterns of Seasonal Floods in Accra, Ghana
desc: Explores flood extent and impact in Accra across three key dates using remote sensing data. Features estimating flooded cropland and built-up area to inform flood management and urban planning.

title: GeoJSON Inspector
desc: A browser tool for visualising GeoJSON data on a map: paste data, view instantly, draw custom features alongside existing data. No setup required.

title: Assessing Access to Healthcare Facilities in Ho Municipal
desc: Examining spatial access to healthcare in Ghana's Ho Municipal, where limited rural access contributes to health outcome disparities between urban and rural populations.

title: Visualising Landcover Classes in Ho - Split Panel App on Earth Engine
desc: A web app enabling toggle between landcover classification and satellite imagery, with zoom, pan, legend, and transparency controls — directly in the browser via Google Earth Engine.
